selection_scope: full97 minus four human-confirmed invalid occlusion/depth renders

removed_cases.reason: Visible gap between the chair and coffee-table silhouettes.
The bench does not visibly occlude the metal shelves.
The suitcase does not visibly occlude the sofa.
The chair is not visibly present, so the relation graph is incomplete.

archival_policy: The original full76/full97 data, images, and scores remain archived and are not overwritten.
evaluation_policy: FLUX, SDXL, LayoutGPT, and T2I-Blender RGB use the same 93 cases, materialized questions, Qwen3-VL-8B judge, and strict scoring code.
